definition: The act of choosing which traits to compose and what dimension values they take when constructing a component. Local, total, and developer-owned — expressed as attributes on the substrate (e.g. selection="model=single") or as a list of with* factories in TypeScript. Distinct from Ambient Intent, which is the designer-owned behavioral-preference channel propagated via DI.
usage: The structural-construction channel of the Droplist family. Structural dimensions (model, editable) never travel via Ambient Intent — they are always stated locally. Behavioral dimensions (focusStrategy, collision) may fall back to Ambient Intent when not stated.
